Okay, welcome to module three, which is your first official writing workshop session. And in this section, we're going to cover the first five elements of the 15 point sales page in a day theme plate, which will all make up the gap. Now, if your prospect is going to partner with you to cross a chasm and invest in you to cross that chasm or to be that bridge between where they are and where they need to be, then the first thing you got to do is be extremely clear and hyper descriptive of what that gap is in a way that truly resonates with their experience. So that's what these first five sections of the theme plate are designed to do. And here are the specific elements we'll be using to do it. So the first section of this workshop is going to be the pre headline qualifier. We're going to follow that up with what I call the question loop headline, move into the lead, continue into the moment of highest tension and then soothe some of that tension with the moment of highest pleasure. Now before you get started, make sure you have your 67 questions workbook on hand, your five advanced empathy exercises, your enrollment extractor workbook, if you chose to include that in your research process, as well as your launch Bible, as we'll be referring to these docs throughout and showing you really kind of how to link up the sections of that into your sales page. So that's all I got for you on this one. Let's get started. Meet me in the next lesson where we'll go deeper into the pre headline qualifier.
